title: Contact Us
content: Contact Us Get in touch with the organizing committee for any queries regarding ICBAB 2026. Convener Dr. Saurabh Bansal Department of Biotechnology & Bioinformatics (+91) 98821-94150 saurabh.bansal@juitsolan.in Convener Dr. Ashok Kumar Nadda Department of Biotechnology & Bioinformatics (+91) 01792-239354 ashok.nadda@juitsolan.in Convener Dr. Shikha Mittal Department of Biotechnology & Bioinformatics (+91) 01792-239224 shikha.mittal@juitsolan.in General Enquiry For general questions regarding registration or the schedule, drop us a message.
